metadata.description: Twelve Greek gods. One command. A working SaaS. 그리스 신들의 신전 — 설계부터 출항까지 한 마디로 끝내는 멀티 CLI 파이프라인.

plugins.name: skill-olympus
plugins.description: 98 skills + 49 agents + 13 hooks for Claude Code + Codex CLI + Gemini CLI. Twelve Greek gods (zephermine, poseidon, argos, minos, clio, chronos, zeus, hermes, athena, aphrodite, daedalus, mnemo) form a full dev pipeline. Cross-CLI persistent memory, zero-interaction full pipeline (design → build → inspect → test → ship).
